meta.title: Insect-inspired robots
meta.sourceDoc: 70. P3 - Insect-inspired robots 昆虫机器人.pdf

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 27
答案：F
PDF 定位/解析：SectionF首句"Internationalexpertsbelievetherearetremendousopportunities.."紧接着列举军事negative→环保清洁positive→伦理担 忧。正好呈现积极与消极两面。

题目 28
答案：B
PDF 定位/解析：Section B 中段:"The landmarks are then scaled, from small to large, so that the robot can recognise whether it is getting closer to or

题目 29
答案：E
PDF 定位/解析：Section E:...thekey to the cockroach's remarkable cross-country performance lies partly in thefact that its legs do a lot of the "thinking"withouthavingtoconsultthebrain."典型表现--决策直接在肢体完成。

题目 30
答案：D
PDF 定位/解析：SectionD通篇描述Entomopter用于在"thinMartianair"中悬停、探索一即作为太空（火星）探测辅助。

题目 31
答案：A
PDF 定位：SectionA开头连续罗列盐碱地小虫、蟑螂翻越障碍、螳螂虾高光谱视觉等多种本领，并引出"imitationofinsectsystems" 仿生机器人的"技能范围"。
PDF 解析：一展示了激发

题目 32
答案：C
PDF 定位/解析：sub-routinesgoingonsimultaneously。"说明多种导航机制并行运行。 关键词定位&引用

questionSections.text:
题目 33
答案：mantis shrimp
PDF 定位/解析：SectionA："Themantisshrimpscansitsaquaticworldthroughhyperspectraleyes."暗示其水下视力极佳。

题目 34
答案：a panoramic camera / panoramic camera
PDF 定位/解析：SectionB："Aresearchteam...byrecognisingthem individuallyusingapanoramic camera。"题干已给出computer，因 此新增设备即panoramiccamera。

题目 35
答案：the sahara desert / sahara desert
PDF 定位/解析：Section C开头..journeyed...to the Sahara Desert where Cataglyphis."

题目 36
答案：polarised light
PDF 定位/解析：Section C:"Cataglyphis uses polarised light, caused when airmolecules scatterlight, to orient and steer itself."说明这 种大气光学效应帮助其辨向。

questionSections.text:
题目 37
答案：D
PDF 定位/解析：SectionB说明其机器人会把环境信息按可靠度"分类并存储："..panoramiccameralogs...thenstored in its computer accordingto howreliabletheyare."→对应 categorises information...

题目 38
答案：A
PDF 定位/解析：SectionC描述Sahabot同时利用"polarisedlight+stored360°images"导航-正吻合"makesuse of light as well as stored images"。

题目 39
答案：F
PDF 定位：SectionD强调Entomopter的设计"hasgonebeyondnaturetodeviseacompletelynewconcept.. unusually high lift.."
PDF 解析：一即在昆虫基础上性能"更上一层楼"。

题目 40
答案：C
PDF 定位：SectionE聚焦仿蟑螂六足/"whegs"机器人，强调"runveryfastoverroughterrain"一 move overdifficult surfaces。
PDF 解析：对应can
